Bash(ssh root@2a01:4f8:202:1129:2447:2447:1:901 'docker exec keramik-auszeit-de_web.1.lowp597ykx8dxd8no7hmu2kqk node -e ""const mysql=require\(\\""mysql2/promise\\""\);async function run\(\){const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:\\""mariadb\\"",user:\\""auszeit_user\\"",password:\\""AuszeitDB2025Secure!\\"",database:\\""auszeit_prod\\""}\);const [r]=await c.execute\(\\""SELECT a.id,a.slot_date,a.start_time,a.end_time,b.id as b_id,b.start_time as b_start,b.end_time as b_end FROM time_slots a JOIN time_slots b ON a.slot_date=b.slot_date AND a.id<b.id AND a.start_time<b.end_time AND a.end_time>b.start_time WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY a.slot_date,a.start_time\\""\);if\(r.length===0\)console.log\(\\""Keine Überlappungen\\""\);else r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(x\)\)\);await c.end\(\);}run\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\);"" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh root@2a01:4f8:202:1129:2447:2447:1:901 'docker exec keramik-auszeit-de_web.1.lowp597ykx8dxd8no7hmu2kqk node -e ""const mysql=require\(\\""mysql2/promise\\""\);async function run\(\){const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:\\""mariadb\\"",user:\\""auszeit_user\\"",password:\\""AuszeitDB2025Secure!\\"",database:\\""auszeit_prod\\""}\);const ids=[9,10,18,19,20,23,29,30,39,40,41,43,48,49,54,55,56,83,85,86,88];const [r]=await c.execute\(\\""SELECT id,slot_date,start_time,end_time,max_capacity,available,event_type,created_at FROM time_slots WHERE id IN \(\\""+ids.join\(\\"",\\""\)+\\""\) ORDER BY slot_date,start_time,id\\""\);r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.id+\\"" \\""+x.slot_date.toISOString\(\).slice\(0,10\)+\\"" \\""+x.start_time+\\""-\\""+x.end_time+\\"" cap:\\""+x.max_capacity+\\"" avail:\\""+x.available+\\"" type:\\""+x.event_type+\\"" created:\\""+x.created_at.toISOString\(\).slice\(0,10\)\)\);await c.end\(\);}run\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\);"" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh root@2a01:4f8:202:1129:2447:2447:1:901 'docker exec keramik-auszeit-de_web.1.lowp597ykx8dxd8no7hmu2kqk node -e ""const mysql=require\(\\""mysql2/promise\\""\);async function run\(\){const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:\\""mariadb\\"",user:\\""auszeit_user\\"",password:\\""AuszeitDB2025Secure!\\"",database:\\""auszeit_prod\\""}\);const [cols]=await c.execute\(\\""SHOW COLUMNS FROM bookings\\""\);console.log\(cols.map\(x=>x.Field\).join\(\\"", \\""\)\);await c.end\(\);}run\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\);"" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh root@2a01:4f8:202:1129:2447:2447:1:901 'docker exec keramik-auszeit-de_web.1.lowp597ykx8dxd8no7hmu2kqk node -e ""const mysql=require\(\\""mysql2/promise\\""\);async function run\(\){const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:\\""mariadb\\"",user:\\""auszeit_user\\"",password:\\""AuszeitDB2025Secure!\\"",database:\\""auszeit_prod\\""}\);const [statuses]=await c.execute\(\\""SELECT DISTINCT booking_status FROM bookings LIMIT 10\\""\);console.log\(\\""Statuses:\\"",statuses.map\(x=>x.booking_status\).join\(\\"", \\""\)\);const ids=[9,10,18,19,20,23,29,30,39,40,41,43,48,49,54,55,56,83,85,86,88];const [r]=await c.execute\(\\""SELECT time_slot_id,COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM bookings WHERE time_slot_id IN \(\\""+ids.join\(\\"",\\""\)+\\""\) AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY time_slot_id ORDER BY time_slot_id\\""\);r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(\\""slot \\""+x.time_slot_id+\\"": \\""+x.cnt+\\"" Buchungen\\""\)\);await c.end\(\);}run\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\);"" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh root@2a01:4f8:202:1129:2447:2447:1:901 'docker exec keramik-auszeit-de_web.1.lowp597ykx8dxd8no7hmu2kqk node -e ""const mysql=require\(\\""mysql2/promise\\""\);async function run\(\){const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:\\""mariadb\\"",user:\\""auszeit_user\\"",password:\\""AuszeitDB2025Secure!\\"",database:\\""auszeit_prod\\""}\);const ids=[9,10,18,19,20,23,29,30,39,40,41,43,48,49,54,55,56,83,85,86,88];const [r]=await c.execute\(\\""SELECT time_slot_id,booking_status,COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM bookings WHERE time_slot_id IN \(\\""+ids.join\(\\"",\\""\)+\\""\) AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY time_slot_id,booking_status ORDER BY time_slot_id\\""\);r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(\\""slot \\""+x.time_slot_id+\\"" [\\""+x.booking_status+\\""]: \\""+x.cnt\)\);await c.end\(\);}run\(\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\);"" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh root@2a01:4f8:202:1129:2447:2447:1:901 'docker exec keramik-auszeit-de_web.1.lowp597ykx8dxd8no7hmu2kqk node -e ""const mysql=require\(\\""mysql2/promise\\""\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:\\""mariadb\\"",user:\\""auszeit_user\\"",password:\\""AuszeitDB2025Secure!\\"",database:\\""auszeit_prod\\""}\);const [r]=await c.execute\(\\""SELECT time_slot_id,booking_status,COUNT\(*\) cnt FROM bookings WHERE time_slot_id IN \(9,10,18,19,20,23,29,30,39,40,41,43,48,49,54,55,56,83,85,86,88\) AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY time_slot_id,booking_status ORDER BY time_slot_id\\""\);r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.time_slot_id,x.booking_status,x.cnt\)\);await c.end\(\);}\)\(\).catch\(console.error\);"" 2>&1')
